Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing intersection, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: right, center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, glass, brick, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp
- landscape: grass strip, hedge, flower bed, mulch
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2005
Post-9/11 era. A 2005 gas station — big multi-island canopy, card readers at every pump, LED price sign, and a convenience store doing most of the business.

PERIOD DETAILS
- convenience store always attached
- pay-at-pump screens with small displays
- price sign showing gas around $2.30
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Shell
Typography: clean sans-serif, polished brand identities.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.- window signs: 'CAR WASH $6', 'ENERGY DRINKS 2 FOR $4'
- trash cans with paper-towel dispensers between the pumps
- a propane exchange cage by the storefront
Typography: clean sans-serif, polished brand identities.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 6 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver self-serving at the pump
- a woman inserting her card at the pump reader
- a man in cargo shorts talking on a flip phone
Clothing: men in graphic tees, frosted tips hair; women in trucker hats, chunky highlights. Fashion palette: denim, pink, white. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2000-2005 Ford Focus — European-styled compact — dark blue
- 2003-2009 Hummer H2 — massive military-styled SUV — silver
- 2004-2012 Chevrolet Colorado — mid-size pickup — gray
- 2002-2009 Chevrolet TrailBlazer — mid-size SUV boxy — dark red
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2005.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the rest parked on the RIGHT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, turn arrows
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, cable and fiber lines on poles appearing

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: very young sapling
- deciduous tree at background: maturing tree
- deciduous tree at right: maturing tree
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — early digital camera or Kodak/Fuji consumer film look.
Color: neutral tones. Grain: low grain, early digital noise in shadows.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
